UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANYS DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND.DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO WRONGFUL EVICTION CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF CONCEDES THAT IT IS PREMATURE. DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR IIED. THIS CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED. KRUSE IS INAPPOSITE. "A PARTY IS NOT SUBJECT TO LIABILITY FOR INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS WHEN IT HAS MERELY PURSUED ITS OWN ECONOMIC INTERESTS AND PROPERLY ASSERTED ITS LEGAL RIGHTS." HERE, WHETHER DEFENDANTS ASSERTED THEIR LEGAL RIGHTS PROPERLY IS AN ISSUE OF FACT THAT CANNOT BE ADDRESSED ON DEMURRER. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT HAS PREVIOUSLY SUSTAINED THE DEMURRER WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FRAUD CAUSE OF ACTION, PARAGRAPHS 32 TO 70 OF THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT. AMENDMENT TO THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT ATTEMPTS TO EXPAND ON PARAGRAPH 70 AND INCORPORATE IT INTO CAUSES OF ACTION FOR WRONGFUL FORECLOSURE, VIOLATION OF BUSINESS AND PROFESSIONS CODE 17200, INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS, SLANDER OF TITLE AND DECLARATORY RELIEF. PLAINTIFF SHALL ALLEGE WITH SPECIFICITY AND IN GOOD FAITH ALL NECESSARY FACTS FOR REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES AGAINST A CORPORATE ENTITY. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of The Amendment To The Third Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY's Motion To Strike Portions Of The Amendment To The Third Amended Complaint is GRANTED with leave to amend. Plaintiff shall file an amended complaint clearly indicating for which causes of action punitive damages are requested. The Court has previously sustained the demurrer without leave to amend as to the fraud cause of action, paragraphs 32 to 70 of Third Amended Complaint. Amendment to Third Amended Complaint attempts to expand on paragraph 70 and incorporate it into causes of action for Wrongful Foreclosure, Violation of Business and Professions Code 17200, Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress, Slander of Title and Declaratory Relief. In some of these causes of action punitive damages are not requested/mentioned. Plaintiff shall allege with specificity and in good faith all necessary facts for request for punitive damages against a corporate entity. Plaintiff shall allege in good faith that defendant "did not receive a valid assignment of debt in any manner" Fontenot v. Wells Fargo (2011) 198 Cal.App.4th 256, 271-272; and facts re: standing to challenge the assignment. Jenkins v. JP Morgan Chase Bank (2013) 216 Cal.App.4th 497. Plaintiff's untimely opposition has been addressed in reply and considered by the Court. Prevailing party to prepare and submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Taline M. Gulessarian, Esq., of AlvaradoSmith (714-852-6800) for Deutsche Bank, Defendant and Moving party appearing through Court Call.
George S. Wynns, Esq., of Law office of George S. Wynns (415-279-7397) for Gigi Ellis Plaintiff and opposing party.

ARGUED. COURT having reviewd the pleadings and having heard oral argument modifies the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANYs DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to the cause of action for fraud is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to wrongful eviction cause of action. Plaintiff concedes that it is premature. Demurrer is overruled as to cause of action for IIED. This cause of action is sufficiently alleged. Kruse is inapposite. "A party is not subject to liability for infliction of emotional distress when it has merely pursued its own economic interests and properly asserted its legal rights." Here, whether Defendants asserted their legal rights properly is an issue of fact that cannot be addressed on demurrer. Moving Party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Peter J. Busch, Clerk M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY AND CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is overruled as to causes of action 1 (Cancellation of Deed); 2 (Quiet Title); 4 (Wrongful Foreclosure); 5 (Violation of B&P 17200; 7 (Slander of Title); 9 (Declaratory Releif).
